ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CGC-17-276577 AND CGC-18-276693 IS GRANTED FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL. HENCEFORTH, CASE NO. 276577 SHALL BE THE LEAD CASE. SUBSEQUENT DOCUMENTS MUST BE FILED ONLY IN THE LEAD CASE AND ALL DOCUMENTS FILED IN THE CONSOLIDATED CASE MUST INCLUDE THE CAPTION AND CASE NUMBER OF THE LEAD CASE, FOLLOWED BY THE CASE NUMBER OF THE OTHER CONSOLIDATED CASE. (CRC 3.3350) THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APRIL 18, 2019 IN CASE NO. 276693 IS VACATED. THE CONSOLIDATED CASE IS ADDED TO THE OCTOBER 18, 2018 TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE, CLERK: A. MOK AND J. ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. (503)

Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar Dec-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Motion for an Order to Apportion and Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: L. Bareng. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:56 a.m.

Kimberly Chu, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP appeared for plaintiffs and Wrongful Death Heirs Robert Cibel and Irving James Cibel III who were present and were placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Cibel and Ms. Chu appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, RULES that the following are entitled to distribution of all net funds obtained by their counsel, Brayton Purcell LLP, derived from all funds negotiated after the May 11, 2017 death of James Cibel in the following proportions:

Estate of James Cibel, Deceased - ___%

Linda Cibel, as Wrongful Death Heir - ___%

Shaun Cibel, as Wrongful Death Heir - ___%

Irving James Cibel III, as Wrongful Death Heir - ___%

Robert Cibel, as Wrongful Death Heir - ___%

All future net funds derived from settlements entered into after the May 11, 2017 death of James Cibel shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

The signature of plaintiff Irving James Cibel III shall be sufficient on all settlement documents for the purpose of settling both the estate and wrongful death claims with defendants in all claims with settlements negotiated after James Cibel's death.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed Order to Apportion and Distribute Funds and submit same to the Court for reveiw and signature.

Proceedings conclude at 10:24 a.m.

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-276693 WITH CASE CGC-17-276577
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to consolidate cases CGC-17-276577 and CGC-18-276693 is granted. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes including trial. Henceforth, case no. 276577 shall be the lead case. Subsequent documents must be filed only in the lead case and all documents filed in the consolidated case must include the caption and case number of the lead case, followed by the case number of the other consolidated case. (CRC 3.3350) The case management conference set for April 18, 2019 in case no. 276693 is vacated. The consolidated case is added to the October 18, 2018 trial setting conference. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok and J. Alameda. Not reported. (503/CML)
